_meta.notes: warehausae service pages share a consistent layout: hero with tagline + service name + lead heading, intro prose, capabilities bullet list, methodology/approach blocks (4 typically), team leader cards, and a recent projects list.

prompt: Extract structured data from a warehausae.com service landing page. Capture the hero text, intro prose, capabilities list, methodology blocks, team leaders, and recent projects. Preserve URLs and email addresses verbatim. Do not invent fields.
systemPrompt: You are extracting data from a single page on warehausae.com. Return only fields that appear on the page; leave missing fields as null or empty arrays.

service_name.description: The service discipline shown in the hero, e.g. 'architecture', 'civil engineering', 'interior design'.

tagline.description: The short pre-heading or motto displayed above the service name (e.g. 'We listen. We design. We deliver.'). May be missing.

lead_heading.description: The primary H2/H3 below the hero that frames the value proposition.

intro_prose.description: The paragraph(s) of body copy immediately after the lead heading, joined with double newlines.

capabilities.description: Bulleted capabilities/disciplines shown on the page, in order.

approach_heading.description: Heading of the methodology section (e.g. 'Our Architectural Approach'). May be missing.

approach_blocks.description: Sub-sections under the approach heading; typically 4 cards (e.g. Comprehensive Research, Community Feedback, Design Charettes, Concept Sketches).

title.description: Role / job title under the name.

team_leaders.description: Team leader cards shown on the service page. Each links to a /team/{slug}/ profile.

categories.description: Comma-separated category tags shown under each project link.

recent_projects.description: Featured project list at the bottom of the page.

hero_image_url.description: Hero image at the top of the page if any. May be missing.

seo.description: SEO meta read from <title>, meta description, and og:image.
